span.p:
All AAKI classes are rdfs:subClassOf oslc_am:Resource
and inherit the common OSLC core properties
(title, description, creator, created, modified,
serviceProvider, instanceShape, plus six common link types)

svg.text: AAKI Class Diagram — Structural view of the AAKI vocabulary
